subject: Geography
title: Coral Bleaching
description: A quick win: understand Coral Bleaching.

hook.text: When ocean water warms just 1-2°C above normal, coral expels its algae and turns white.

buildup.text: The algae provides 90% of the coral's energy. Without it, the coral starves.

discovery.text: The Great Barrier Reef suffered mass bleaching events in 2016, 2017, 2020, and 2022.

twist.text: Coral reefs support 25% of all marine species despite covering less than 1% of the ocean.

climax.text: If bleaching continues, island nations will lose the reefs that protect them from storms.

punchline.text: Tiny animals built islands. Warm water is killing them.

quiz.question: What percentage of marine species depend on coral reefs?
